reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza vinimos a san Martín de los Andes. Falta nafta. La gente hace colas interminables para cargar primero porque se termina pronto. Q país. Y nuestros politicos  que hacen?? Claro como no veranean en Argentina  no les importa

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace we came to San Martín de los Andes. There's no gas. People wait in endless lines to get first because it runs out quickly. What a country. And what are our politicians doing? Of course, since they don't spend their summers in Argentina, they don't care.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMkpydnRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
No tienen garrafas, ( lamentable decision )
De vez en cuando se quedan sin sistema o no les funciona el pago con la aplicacion o mcdo pago

(Translated by Google)
They don't have gas bottles (regrettable decision).
From time to time, they lose their system or their payment app or payment method doesn't work.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar. limpieza servicios y lugar. Faltaría una proveeduría, pero a una o dos cuadras tenés de todo

(Translated by Google)
Very good place. Cleanliness, services, and location are all great. It could use a convenience store, but you can find everything you need within a block or two.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCd056bGtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre una excelente atención
A revés de otras estaciones de servicio ac siempre están los mismos empleados
Con un trato agradable y cordial

(Translated by Google)
Always excellent service.
Unlike other gas stations, here you'll always find the same employees.
With a pleasant and friendly approach.

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención...sobretodo teniendo en cuenta que era 1/ 1/23 y estaba funcionando con total normalidad. La chica del full atendía con mucha amabilidad ! La felicito!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service...especially considering it was January 1, 2023, and everything was operating normally. The girl at the full counter was incredibly friendly! Congratulations!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCOTZDTDV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Le di $20 de propina (por limpiar el parabrisas, no tenía mas cambio), lo tiro al piso y dejo abierts la tapa del combustible.

(Translated by Google)
I gave him a $20 tip (for cleaning the windshield, I didn't have any more change), he threw it on the floor and left the fuel cap open.
